{
  "claims": [
    "Gun shows have been identified as a source for illegally trafficked firearms.",
    "Gun shows have received criticism as being the critical moment in the chain of custody for many guns, where they move from the regulated legal market to the illegal market.",
    "Gun violence is among the greatest public health crises facing children and youth, with nearly 7,000 children younger than 18 killed or wounded by gunshots each year.",
    "Firearm-related deaths are the third leading cause of death for children ages 1 to 17, outpaced only by car crashes and drownings and illnesses like cancer.",
    "The United States experiences far more gun violence per person than virtually every other modern industrialized country.",
    "The more guns there are in a community, the more gun violence there is.",
    "The California gun show loophole allows people who cannot pass background checks to buy unserialized and untraceable ghost guns.",
    "Ghost guns are increasingly recovered from crime scenes and are a growing problem for law enforcement.",
    "Gun violence in California costs taxpayers $18.3 billion a year."
  ]
}
